name: Dilled Green Tomatoes or Cherry Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
Select small, firm green tomatoes or cherry tomatoes. Pack the tomatoes into sterilized jars and add 1 clove peeled garlic, 1 stalk celery, several strips of green pepper, and a large sprig of dill to each quart jar.
Bring 2 quarts water, 1 quart vinegar, and 1/2 cup pickling salt to a boil. Boil for 5 minutes.
Pour the hot brine over the vegetables in the jars and seal them tightly.
The pickles will be ready to use in about 4 weeks. Hot red pepper, celery seed, and mustard may be added to the vinegar mixture.
